metadata.description: Pratyabhijna x Active Inference creative-cognition engine: a 7-operator cascade with BMR insight detection, packaged as 15 MCP tools, 5 skills, 5 agents, 5 slash commands, and 3 lifecycle hooks.

plugins.name: pratyabhijna-creative-engine
plugins.description: Run the cit -> ananda -> iccha -> apohana -> jnana -> kriya -> vimarsa cascade through 15 MCP tools and 5 skills. Targets poetry generation, poetry interpretation, divergent thinking, and aspect-shift creativity.
